name: Trey Gowdy
subject: Peter, I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Trey Gowdy for Congress
body:
Peter, Democrats have targeted me for defeat. They would love to see me lose, and will probably stop at nothing to make sure that happens. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36595517:WsVt3XY8N:m:1:1320601823:E56E927DDF62D9535FCF9064E763D93E:r)
---
Peter,

I'm running for re-election because I know the work in Washington is not complete.

**But in order to stay fighting for our shared values,**[I need your help**. ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36595517:WsVt3XY8N:m:1:1320601823:E56E927DDF62D9535FCF9064E763D93E:r)**

**When you speak truth to power, you become a target. And I have been targeted by the Democrats and the liberal media.**

My least favorite part of being a Congressman is having to ask for help. I know how hard you work for your paycheck, and I want you to know not a penny goes wasted on my campaign. I run a tight ship, monitor costs closely, and have great people helping me.

But, Peter, the reality is this: Democrats have targeted me for defeat. They would love to see me lose, and will stop at nothing to make sure that happens.

Peter, I need your support today to make sure they lose and we win. We have just over 100 days until Election Day. Your financial donation today will ensure we have the funds to fight back and WIN.

[**If I can count on you will you let me know?** [**Peter, I hope you will consider making a donation online right now. Anything will help.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36595517:WsVt3XY8N:m:1:1320601823:E56E927DDF62D9535FCF9064E763D93E:r)

| [** STAND WITH TREY
Donate NOW >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36595517:WsVt3XY8N:m:1:1320601823:E56E927DDF62D9535FCF9064E763D93E:r)
---

This campaign is not going to be easy. The Democrats in Washington are going to work around the clock to see me defeated.

**[Your donation today will ensure we have the resources to fight back and run a winning campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36595517:WsVt3XY8N:m:1:1320601823:E56E927DDF62D9535FCF9064E763D93E:r)**

I have heard from so many likeminded conservative friends who have encouraged me in this campaign. It's wonderful and great news so many of you are ready to fight for our principles.

The massive Democrat political machine will do whatever it takes to make sure I am defeated in November. We need to run a strong campaign to fight back and your donation today will ensure that is possible.

[** SUPPORT TREY GOWDY
Donate NOW >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36595517:WsVt3XY8N:m:1:1320601823:E56E927DDF62D9535FCF9064E763D93E:r)
---

Thank you for your support for both my campaign and our country.

Sincerely,

Trey Gowdy
South Carolina 4th District

**P.S. I've developed a reputation for holding people accountable, and you can bet that when I win re-election I will continue to do just that. But, Peter, there are many who would love to see me leave Washington and quit holding people - our LEADERS - accountable.[I need your help right now to ensure I am able to run a winning campaign. Will you show your support and stand with me by making a donation right now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36595517:WsVt3XY8N:m:1:1320601823:E56E927DDF62D9535FCF9064E763D93E:r)**

[** STAND WITH TREY
Donate NOW >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36595517:WsVt3XY8N:m:1:1320601823:E56E927DDF62D9535FCF9064E763D93E:r)
---

| Paid For By Trey Gowdy for Congress
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 24, 2016.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWsVt3XY8N). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWsVt3XY8N)

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Be the first to get the Clinton-Kaine sticker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Get your free sticker! | Friend --

Tim Kaine is going to be our next vice president!

Want to show off your pride and welcome him to the team? [**Chip in $1 right now to get your free sticker:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) Tim has been fighting for American families for decades, and we’re so proud he’s going to fight by Hillary’s side -- and yours -- to win this election.

**We’re stronger together, and together, we’re going to make history this November. Let's embrace this team, and show the entire world that we're standing with them:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks -- this is an awesome moment, and I’m thrilled we're all a part of it. Talk soon!

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Welcome Tim Kaine to the ticket -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 1.5 million people standing with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYwNTg1NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzMzY4Mjg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: One clear path
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friends,
There is one clear path to taking back a Democratic Senate majority in 2016: **winning Governor Maggie Hassan's race in New Hampshire.**
But a poll that was just released shows this race is way too close for comfort.
**[That's why I'm asking you to support Maggie in New Hampshire, our best- and maybe ONLY - opportunity to retake a Democratic Senate.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd548/2a380d31/109a3726/fb1ade/2939564906/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzI0LWFtLW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160724-am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
We need Maggie's voice in Washington, and we need to win in New Hampshire to take back the Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court from those intent on sending us backward.
**Please, can you make a contribution to help elect Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire, take back the Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court?** **[http://act.maggiehassan.com/Take-Back-The-Senate](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd548/2a380d31/109a3726/fb1ade/2939564906/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzI0LWFtLW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160724-am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Thanks,
Kirsten
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd548/2a380d31/109a3726/fb1ade/2939564906/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzI0LWFtLW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160724-am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd548/2a380d31/109a3726/fb1adf/2939564906/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Cole Leystra, RussFeingold.com
subject: This message is paid for by
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin
body:
Brought to you by Citizens United. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43cc/1c469400/64df5d8/356ff93/370497116/VEsH/ "http://action.dccc.org/petition/cu16-feingold?sc=cu16_ja_feingold") Friend, This message is brought to you by me, Cole Leystra. It's authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin. I want to talk to you about _Citizens United_. It's been over six years since the Supreme Court decided to open the floodgates to undisclosed, unlimited money in our political system. And now, we're in the midst of what could be the most expensive election in American history. Russ has always fought for campaign finance reform. He's a strong ally in the fight to get money out of politics. Together, as Democrats, we need to fight against _Citizens United_ \-- and to end dark money in politics. **[Join Russ and me today, and add your name to stand with Democrats to fight against _Citizens United_. ](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43cc/1c469400/64df5d8/356ff93/370497116/VEsE/ "http://action.dccc.org/petition/cu16-feingold?sc=cu16_ja_feingold")** We're now served TV ads brought to you by groups with names that are as vague and shady as their donors. Often, the groups that fund these ads don't have to tell you anything about who's footing the bill for those messages, but we can guess. Oil companies can hide behind dark money groups and pay millions for an ad fighting clean air and clean water rules. Or, telecom companies can give money to a super PAC that airs messages attacking a candidate who supports net neutrality. **We need to get rid of dark money in our political system. We need to fight back against _Citizens United_. ** **[Add your name now to join Democrats in the fight against dark money and _Citizens United_.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43cc/1c469400/64df5d8/356ff93/370497116/VEsF/ "http://action.dccc.org/petition/cu16-feingold?sc=cu16_ja_feingold")** We can make our democracy better. That's what this is about, and that's one of many reasons why I support Russ. Thank you, Cole Leystra
Deputy Campaign Manager | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43cc/1c469400/64df5d8/356ff93/370497116/VEsC/ "http://action.dccc.org/petition/cu16-feingold?sc=cu16_ja_feingold")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43cc/1c469400/64df5d8/356ff90/370497116/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43cc/1c469400/64df5d8/356ff91/370497116/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43cc/1c469400/64df5d8/356ff8e/370497116/VEsB/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43cc/1c469400/64df5d8/356ff8f/370497116/VEsO/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
---
All content (C) 2016 Russ for Wisconsin, All Rights Reserved
Russ for Wisconsin
PO Box 620061
Middleton, WI 53562

name: Bill Clinton
subject: Here’s where we come in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I know what Hillary is all about | Friend --

Hillary and I have been married for over 40 years. Seeing her work up close is truly incredible -- she's committed to the task at hand, she's always keeping the people she’s fighting for at the very front of her mind, and she's one of the warmest people you could ever meet.

I realize not everybody gets to see the Hillary that we know, and that’s where you and I come in. The people who love Hillary have got to do what we can to make sure everyone knows what she’s about.

Take that volunteer shift, talk to your friends, and chip in what you can, when you can. Because there are a lot of people to reach, and we have to do it fast.

**Will you start now? Will you donate to help build this team a little bigger and get your official Team Hillary sticker?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYwNjEyOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDQ4NDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Bill

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than 1.5 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYwNjEyOTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDQ4NDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---

clean_body: I know what Hillary is all about | Friend -- Hillary and I have been married for over 40 years. Seeing her work up close is truly incredible -- she's committed to the task at hand, she's always keeping the people she’s fighting for at the very front of her mind, and she's one of the warmest people you could ever meet. I realize not everybody gets to see the Hillary that we know, and that’s where you and I come in. The people who love Hillary have got to do what we can to make sure everyone knows what she’s about. Take that volunteer shift, talk to your friends, and chip in what you can, when you can. Because there are a lot of people to reach, and we have to do it fast. Will you start now? Will you donate to help build this team a little bigger and get your official Team Hillary sticker? Thank you, Bill | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than 1.5 million grassroots donors standing with her: | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). name: Team Bullock
subject: Request your Don't Need Permission slip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---

Friend,

With the virulent anti-public lands movement growing in Washington, D.C. and here at home, sometimes it seems like the Montana we all love is in danger of being carved up for wealthy landowners to use as their own personal playground. **That's not the way it should be. As Steve says, you shouldn't have to be a millionaire to hike, hunt or fish.**

Greg Gianforte just doesn't get this. After filing suit to block public stream access near his mansion, he still thinks he's entitled to "invite" people to come fish near his place. What he and so many out-of-state property owners don't understand is that Montanans don't need permission to use a public access point. It's the law -- it's our right.

So we thought we'd clear it up for Mr. Gianforte. **[Chip in $5 and we'll send you your own Don't Need Permission slip.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lIzEmqUCaVQBmjjxY9xQL8vZu5GtQecU)**

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=GWLgYe6aPCLTsM%2FbilCQycvZu5GtQecU)
---

Steve has fought his whole career to defend access to public land and waters and his work has helped ensure that Montana has some of the strongest public access laws in the country. Under his watch, Montanans will never need permission to lawfully access public lands and waters.

**[Be sure to pitch in $5 to get your own Don't Need Permission slip.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jX2MHPt7LDI7gFnBZMvsacvZu5GtQecU)** It'll be sized to fit a standard wallet so you can have it handy when you run into a confused out-of-state land owner. But hurry, we only printed a limited few.

Thanks,

Team Bullock
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Yz3%2Bm91bo%2FWW6awJpH5cssvZu5GtQecU)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HHoE%2FSshlUIUrnJnCYU3hMvZu5GtQecU).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I am so honored to join this team | Friend --

Thank you so much for the warm welcome to the team!

I could not be more honored to fight alongside you -- I know that **[together, we're going to win in November.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I wanted to take a moment to tell you a little bit more about myself -- and bear with me, since I know you might not have even heard of me before Friday!

Growing up in Kansas, vice president was never a job I aspired to.

My dad ran an iron-working shop and my entire family pitched in to help.

My parents taught me the lessons that have guided my entire life -- my mom once told me: "Tim, you have to decide if you want to be right or do right. If you want to be right, be a pessimist. If you want to do right, be an optimist."

I've been an optimist ever since. And since my time at a Jesuit boys school, I've been a man of faith.

After racing through college and starting at Harvard Law, I took a year off to volunteer with missionaries in Honduras. I got a firsthand look at a system in which the few folks at the top had all the power and everyone else got left behind.

That experience convinced me: We've got to expand opportunity and equality for everyone, no matter where they come from, how much money they have, what they look like, or who they love.

I'm lucky to have married a woman who felt the same: Anne is the daughter of Virginia Governor Linwood Holton, who integrated Virginia's public schools and modeled how important it was by sending his kids in to lead the way.

Anne and I settled in Richmond, started a family, joined a church, and made our home together. I took on work as a civil rights lawyer, representing people who were denied housing because of their race or disability.

I found myself at a lot of City Council meetings to raise the issues I was dealing with on behalf of my clients. But the infighting was horrible! So in 1994, I decided to run for office. I knocked on every door in my district, and I won by 94 votes. (I know the value of the kind of organizing this team is doing!)

If I'm good at anything in public life, it's because I started on the local level, listening to people, learning about their lives, and trying to find consensus.

In the years that followed, I became mayor of Richmond, lieutenant governor of Virginia, and in 2006, I served as governor.

I had to make tough calls during the recession. But I'm proud of what we accomplished in Virginia: the best managed state, the best state for business, and my personal favorite accolade, the best state to raise a child.

I've kept it up as Virginia's senator. And I won't stop when Hillary and I are in the White House. We'll do what we know best: Deliver results for people.

That's what drives us both. Hillary and I have different faiths but we share a common creed: Do all the good you can in all the ways you can.

We don't back away from tough fights. We're energized by them. Hillary and I have a strong progressive agenda and we're not going to get distracted from it.

We'll make our economy work for everyone. We'll make college debt-free. We'll take on the NRA, we'll work toward comprehensive immigration reform -- we'll fight for paid family leave, and equality for women, and making sure every kid has a chance to live up to their potential.

These are tough times -- but we're tough people. We can do it.

**Let's go. I'm excited to work with you to make history:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks again for the warm welcome.

Tim

|
**Welcome Tim Kaine to the ticket -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 1.5 million people standing with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYwNjE2MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNDYyNzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Protect Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cf6/738133e4/37bde24e/7f82d63f/1458072387/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160724/?subsource=ngpattre160724m")
---
| Friend,

Millions of Floridians can name someone they know and love who relies on Medicare. For 51 years, Medicare has been a promise to seniors that if you work hard and pay in, you'll have reliable health insurance when you need it most.

**But Republicans like Marco Rubio don't see Medicare as the safety net it is.** They see it as an expense. They think cutting benefits, privatizing it, or turning it into a voucher system is an acceptable way to cut costs.

Let me be as clear as I possibly can here: I will not stand for cuts to Medicare. I've seen what Medicare has done for so many people. I'm sure you've seen Medicare work for someone in your life, too. It's too important to fall to political games.

**The 51st anniversary of Medicare is next Sunday. In honor of that anniversary, I'm asking 5,100 Democrats to stand with me and protect Medicare from Republican attacks.**

[_**Will you click here and add your name?**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cf6/738133e4/37bde24e/7f82d63f/1458072387/VEsE/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160724/?subsource=ngpattre160724m")

There is no excuse to threaten the financial security of seniors. None.

I will work to protect Medicare for as long as I have the honor of representing Florida families. Thank you for joining me.

Patrick |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cf6/738133e4/37bde24e/7f82d699/1458072387/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cf6/738133e4/37bde24e/7f82d69a/1458072387/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.
